summary: Clear soundboard capture of a rare Pigpen‑led Big Boy Pete that shines in an otherwise solid show.
review: The recording is a decent‑quality soundboard source that satisfies listeners looking for a clean download. The performance stands out thanks to the Pigpen version of “Big Boy Pete,” with Bob and Jerry trading verses – a moment reviewers say later shows never matched. Overall the set is praised, though one reviewer gave only an average rating, leaving the impression mixed but leaning positive.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical highlight (Big Boy Pete) and generally good soundboard quality offset by limited commentary and a middling three‑star review.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note the recording is clear enough to attract downloaders; no specific issues mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No detailed comments on pacing, but the highlighted Big Boy Pete performance is described as a high point.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for trading lyrics with Bob on Big Boy Pete.
band_member_comments.Bob: Praised for trading lyrics with Jerry on Big Boy Pete.
